description: 2 LEVEL LIVING WITH WALK-OUT BACKYARD - Welcome home to Lakeside by Polygon at Sunstone, where space, light, and community come together. This 1,965 sq ft, two-level home offers an open, airy main floor with 9-foot ceilings and radiant in-floor heating—perfect for everyday family life. The kitchen sits at the heart of the home, finished with quartz countertops, marble backsplash, and a gas cooktop, and opens directly to a flat walk-out deck with gas BBQ hookup and a private backyard, ideal for kids, pets, and summer evenings. Upstairs features generously sized bedrooms designed for growing families. Residents also receive access to a 12,000 sqft Sunstone Club with resort-style amenities. You're gonna love living here. OPEN HOUSE: Saturday, Feb 14th 2-4pm.
